data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for informational workflow status. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for warnings on workflow stalls, transition mismatches, or runtime backpressure. Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for blocking workflow failures (transition error, instance persistence). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Severity label for critical workflow incidents (runtime crash, instance corruption). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on the workflow-definition save button. Imperative; sentence case. Block-scoped pilot string for cascade verification.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on dismiss/abort buttons in workflow dialogs. Imperative; sentence case. Distinct from any future "cancel running instance" domain action.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Action verb on retry button after a failed workflow transition. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Empty-state placeholder shown while a workflow definition or instance is being fetched. Trailing horizontal ellipsis (U+2026).
